## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change and why it's needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change
- [ ] No algorithm-specific code added to `core/`
- [ ] Separation of concerns maintained (optimizer ≠ policy manager)
- [ ] README updated if public API changed
